title: MailerLite vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Klaviyo. We break down pricing, features, and which email marketing tool fits your business.
intro: MailerLite and Klaviyo are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different business needs. MailerLite caters to small businesses and freelancers seeking affordable, straightforward email campaigns, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce automation for Shopify and WooCommerce stores. This comparison will help you determine which platform aligns best with your marketing goals and budget.
choose_a_if: You're a small business or freelancer with a limited budget
You want an intuitive drag-and-drop editor and quick setup
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys alongside email marketing
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You need advanced segmentation and predictive analytics
You want SMS marketing and customer review features integrated

faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite is better for budget-conscious small businesses and beginners, offering a more intuitive interface and affordable pricing. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce brands that need advanced automation, predictive analytics, and SMS capabilities. Neither is universally 'better'—it's about fit.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Klaviyo?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper, starting at $9/month with a generous free tier of 1,000 subscribers. Klaviyo's paid plans begin at $45/month with a smaller free tier of 500 subscribers. For budget-focused businesses, MailerLite offers better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign data, though you'll need to manually recreate complex automations. MailerLite provides import tools to help move your contacts over. Plan the migration carefully to minimize disruption to your campaigns.
